notes: Client wants Clara to mention the $115 service call fee only if the customer asks.

after_hours_flow_summary: After-hours emergency calls will be patched through to the client; non-emergency after-hours calls will be returned the next business day.
office_hours_flow_summary: Main line forwarded to AI agent; caller can be patched through to a person if they want to speak to someone. AI answers calls and provides a quick purpose before patching.
notes: Client will test the AI agent and provide feedback before going live.
